caption: A screen recording showcases a web browser displaying a Statista bar chart titled "Percentage of COVID-19 cases in the United States from February 12 to March 16, 2020 resulting in death, by age group". To the left of the browser is a live chat feed with various usernames and messages. A small video overlay in the upper right shows a person wearing a red shirt and a black hat. The entire interface is framed by a decorative border with a futuristic, industrial aesthetic. At the bottom of the screen, a red banner contains the white text "Youtube.com/c/NormalAmericawithRobNoerr". Throughout the sequence, the browser window remains static, but the chat feed on the left scrolls upward as new messages appear. The person in the video overlay remains in a similar position, while the content of the chat continues to update.
